scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:team"
scripts.build: npm --prefix auth-service run build && npm --prefix user-service run build && npm --prefix team-service run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix auth-service run test && npm --prefix user-service run test && npm --prefix team-service run test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix auth-service run lint && npm --prefix user-service run lint && npm --prefix team-service run lint
